debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
inst✝⁸ : NormedAddCommGroup E
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
P : Measure Ω
X : ι → Ω → E
inst✝⁷ : LinearOrder ι
𝓕 : Filtration ι mΩ
inst✝⁶ : TopologicalSpace ι
inst✝⁵ : OrderTopology ι
inst✝⁴ : OrderBot ι
inst✝³ : MeasurableSpace ι
inst✝² : SecondCountableTopology ι
inst✝¹ : NormedSpace ℝ E
inst✝ : CompleteSpace E
hX1 : Martingale X 𝓕 P
hX2 : ∀ (ω : Ω), RightContinuous fun x => X x ω
⊢ @ProbabilityTheory.ClassD ι Ω E inst✝⁸ mΩ instDistribLatticeOfLinearOrder.toSemilatticeInf.toPreorder ⋯ inst✝³ X 𝓕 P ↔
    UniformIntegrable X 1 P

by
  refine ⟨fun h => ?_, fun h => ?_⟩
  · let constT (t : ι) : {T | IsStoppingTime 𝓕 T ∧ ∀ ω, T ω ≠ ⊤} :=
      ⟨fun ω => t, ⟨isStoppingTime_const 𝓕 t, by simp⟩⟩
    have eq : X = fun t ω => stoppedValue X (constT t).1 ω := by
      ext t ω; simp [constT, stoppedValue]
    simpa [eq] using h.uniformIntegrable.comp constT
  · refine classD_of_uniformIntegrable_bounded_stoppingTime ?_ ?_
    · exact hX1.uniformIntegrable_bounded_stoppingTime hX2 (by simp) h
    · exact hX1.adapted.progMeasurable_of_rightContinuous hX2

by
  refine ⟨fun h => ?_, fun h => ?_⟩
  · let constT (t : ι) : {T | IsStoppingTime 𝓕 T ∧ ∀ ω, T ω ≠ ⊤} :=
      ⟨fun ω => t, ⟨isStoppingTime_const 𝓕 t, by simp⟩⟩
    have eq : X = fun t ω => stoppedValue X (constT t).1 ω := by
      ext t ω; simp [constT, stoppedValue]
    simpa [eq] using h.uniformIntegrable.comp constT
  · have hY : Submartingale (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) 𝓕 P :=
      hX1.submartingale_convex_comp (convexOn_norm convex_univ) continuous_norm
        (fun t ↦ (hX1.integrable t).norm)
    have hY_cont : ∀ ω, RightContinuous (fun t ↦ ‖X t ω‖) := fun ω t ↦ (hX2 ω t).norm
    have hY_nonneg : 0 ≤ fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖ := fun t ω ↦ norm_nonneg _
    have hY_classD : ClassD (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) 𝓕 P :=
      MeasureTheory.Submartingale.classD_iff_uniformIntegrable.2
        (hY.uniformIntegrable_bounded_stoppingTime hY_cont hY_nonneg h)
    exact classD_of_uniformIntegrable_bounded_stoppingTime
      (hX1.uniformIntegrable_bounded_stoppingTime hX2 (by simp) h)
      (hX1.adapted.progMeasurable_of_rightContinuous hX2)

  refine ⟨fun h => ?_, fun h => ?_⟩
  · let constT (t : ι) : {T | IsStoppingTime 𝓕 T ∧ ∀ ω, T ω ≠ ⊤} :=

      (hX2 ω).norm

    have h_classD : ClassD (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) 𝓕 P :=

      MeasureTheory.Submartingale.classD_iff_uniformIntegrable.2
        hY hY_cont hY_nonneg h.norm
    exact classD_of_uniformIntegrable_bounded_stoppingTime
      (hX1.uniformIntegrable_bounded_stoppingTime hX2 (by simp) h) 
      (hX1.adapted.progMeasurable_of_rightContinuous hX2)

by
  refine ⟨fun h => ?_, fun h => ?_⟩
  · let constT (t : ι) : {T | IsStoppingTime 𝓕 T ∧ ∀ ω, T ω ≠ ⊤} :=
      ⟨fun ω => t, isStoppingTime_const 𝓕 t, fun _ => WithTop.coe_ne_top t⟩
    have : X = fun t ω => stoppedValue X (constT t).1 ω := by
      ext t ω; simp [constT, stoppedValue]
    simpa [this] using h.uniformIntegrable.comp constT
  · have hY : Submartingale (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) 𝓕 P :=
      hX1.submartingale_convex_comp (convexOn_norm convex_univ) continuous_norm
        (fun t => (hX1.integrable t).norm)
    have hY_cont : ∀ ω, RightContinuous (fun t => ‖X t ω‖) := fun ω =>
      (hX2 ω).norm
    have hY_nonneg : 0 ≤ fun t ω => ‖X t ω‖ := fun t ω => norm_nonneg _
    have hY_classD : ClassD (fun t ω => ‖X t ω‖) 𝓕 P :=
      MeasureTheory.Submartingale.classD_iff_uniformIntegrable.2
        hY hY_cont hY_nonneg h
    refine ⟨hX1.adapted.progMeasurable_of_rightContinuous hX2, ?_⟩
    rw [uniformIntegrable_iff_norm] at h ⊢
    exact hY_classD.uniformIntegrable

by
  refine ⟨fun h => ?_, fun h => ?_⟩
  · let constT (t : ι) : {T | IsStoppingTime 𝓕 T ∧ ∀ ω, T ω ≠ ⊤} :=
      ⟨fun ω => t, ⟨isStoppingTime_const 𝓕 t, by simp⟩⟩
    have eq : X = fun t ω => stoppedValue X (constT t).1 ω := by
      ext t ω; simp [constT, stoppedValue]

  · have h_sub : Submartingale (fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖) 𝓕 P :=
      hX1.submartingale_convex_comp (convexOn_norm convex_univ) continuous_norm
        (fun t => (hX1.integrable t).norm)
    have h_nonneg : 0 ≤ fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖ := fun t ω => norm_nonneg _
    have h_cont : ∀ ω, RightContinuous fun t => ‖X t ω‖ := fun ω =>
      (hX2 ω).norm

      MeasureTheory.Submartingale.classD_iff_uniformIntegrable.2
        h_sub h_cont h_nonneg h
    refine classD_of_uniformIntegrable_bounded_stoppingTime ?_ ?_
    · exact h_classD.uniformIntegrable.comp

                fun ω => ‖stoppedValue X T.1 ω‖ := by
              ext ω; simp [stoppedValue]

    · exact hX1.adapted.progMeasurable_of_rightContinuous hX2
